summary: Enhanced Trade Signal module testing completed successfully. All 18 backend tests passed and frontend UI verified. New features tested: setup_type classification, liquidity_sweep_zone, safe_invalidation, sweep_detected, sweep_analysis fields, minimum 0.50% move filter, and smart stop placement logic.
passed_tests: setup_type field present with valid values (standard/sweep_reversal/continuation)
liquidity_sweep_zone field present (float or null)
safe_invalidation field present (float or null)
sweep_detected field present (boolean)
sweep_analysis field present (string or null)
estimated_move field present and numeric
NO TRADE handled correctly when move below 0.50% threshold
Stop loss placed beyond sweep zone for LONG/SHORT
invalidation_reason descriptive for trades
sweep_reversal setup type triggers sweep_detected=true
Reasoning includes liquidity context for trades
warnings list present with trap risk warnings
R/R warning appears when ratio below 1.5:1
REGRESSION: /api/market/bias works correctly
REGRESSION: /api/liquidity works correctly
REGRESSION: /api/support-resistance works correctly
All 5 new enhanced fields present in response
Field consistency verified for LONG/SHORT/NO TRADE
UI: TradeSignalCard displays with data-testid
UI: Setup type badge (STANDARD) visible in header
UI: Direction badge (NO TRADE) with confidence %
UI: Warnings section with trap risk warning
UI: Show Details expands Signal Reasoning
UI: Factor Breakdown shows all 7 factors with scores
UI: Refresh button triggers signal update
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Trade Signal module fully tested. Current signal shows NO TRADE due to mixed market conditions (NEUTRAL bias, mixed exchange consensus). This is expected behavior - the module correctly identifies when factors are not aligned. The 5 new fields (setup_type, liquidity_sweep_zone, safe_invalidation, sweep_detected, sweep_analysis) are all present in the API response. Liquidity Sweep Zone UI section only appears for LONG/SHORT signals with sweep data. Regression tests confirm /api/market/bias, /api/liquidity, and /api/support-resistance still work correctly.

new_trade_signal_fields.liquidity_sweep_zone: Returns price level or null for NO TRADE
new_trade_signal_fields.safe_invalidation: Returns price level or null for NO TRADE

minimum_move_filter.behavior: Signal shows NO TRADE if estimated_move < 0.50%

smart_stop_loss.behavior: Stop placed beyond obvious support/resistance to avoid stop hunts

ui_components.liquidity_sweep_zone_section: Shows when signal has sweep data
